keywords.note: categoryTokens = preserved full names; keywordTokens = inverted-index tokens (normalized phrases since E-class bug fix). If multi-word category names appear fragmented in keywordTokens, this is a regression of the E-class bug.

rules.name: Oath of Moment
rules.description:
If your Army Faction is **^^Adeptus Astartes^^**, at theГӮВ start of your Command phase, select one unit fromГӮВ your opponentГўВҖВҷs army. Until the start of your nextГӮВ Command phase, that enemy unit is your OathГӮВ of Moment target. Each time a model with thisГӮВ ability makes an attack that targets your Oath ofГӮВ Moment target:
ГўВ–В  You can reroll the Hit roll
ГўВ–В  If you are using a Codex: Space Marines Detachment and your army does not include one or more unitsГӮВ with the **^^Black Templars^^**, **^^Blood Angels^^**, **^^Dark Angels^^**, **^^Deathwatch^^** or **^^Space Wolves^^** keywords, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

rules.name: Total Obliteration
rules.description: Each time a ranged attack made by aГӮВ model in this unit targets a Monster or Vehicle model, youГӮВ can re-roll the Hit roll, you can re-roll the Wound roll and you can re-roll the Damage roll.

rules.name: Templar Vows
rules.description:
If your Army Faction is **^^Adeptus Astartes^^**, at the start of the first battle round, select one of the following Vows to be active for **^^Adeptus Astartes^^** units from your army. While a Vow is active for your army, that unit has the associated ability below.ГӮВ 

**Abhor the Witch, Destroy the Witch**
ГўВ–В  Each time this unit declares a charge, if one or more targets of that charge have the **^^Psyker^^** keyword, you can re-roll the Charge roll. Melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the **[PRECISION]** ability while targeting **^^Psyker^^** units.ГӮВ 

**Accept Any Challenge, No Matter the Odds**
ГўВ–В  Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is less than or equal to the Toughness characteristic of the target, add 1 to the wound roll

**Suffer Not the Unclean to Live**
ГўВ–В  This unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back, and each time a model in this unit makes a Pile-in or Consolidation move, it does not need to end that move closer to the closest enemy model, provided it ends that move as close as possible to the nearest enemy unit.ГӮВ 

**Uphold the Honour of the Emperor**
If this unit has the **^^Infantry^^** keyword:
ГўВ–В  At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent's level of control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of the phase.ГӮВ 
ГўВ–В  If the mission you are playing features Actions, this unit is eligible to start to perform an Action in a turn in which it Advanced.
